get.summary: Get agent activity log for a run
get.description: Returns agent interaction events associated with a flow run. Events are returned newest-first from the ``agentInteraction`` MongoDB collection. Use ``limit`` to control the number of events returned.

500.description: Internal server error. The `error_code` field will be `INTERNAL_ERROR`. Check the `message` and `detail` fields for diagnostics.

503.description: LLM / OpenAI / Gemini service unavailable. The `error_code` field will be `LLM_ERROR` (retries exhausted) or `BILLING_ERROR` (billing / quota issue). The affected flow run is automatically paused — resume it after resolving the issue.
